entry.title: Re: Restrict only J2ee_adm_sid periodic password change i...
entry.content:
It depends on your ume configuration.
If the user is located in the local java database, set the user to type "Technical".
If the ume ist pointing to the ABAP stack and the user is located there, change it in SU01 to type "Service"

entry.title: Re: SAP EMS- Challenges in Using Batch jobs to update EMS...
entry.content:
Hi Srinivas, 

You could leverage Update Task of ruleset to update status of entiltement together with end date. 

In basic mode, advanced mode and script task all support. 

Just to find the ruleset update end date of entiltement first and update this ruleset update task. 

Br,

Lambert Chen

entry.title: Re: Object Page in Fiori List Report is blank (Column hea...

I have defined the annotations in my cds view. Am I supposed to add something else?

entry.title: Re: Adding fields to AMON1 (Alert Monitor)
entry.content:
HI Wesh,

There are some help in SE18 in the documentation of: BAdI /SAPAPO/AM_ALERTLIST - MODIFY_FIELDCATALOG.

See also: 1374207 - AMON: Modifying the field catalog of saved alert situations - example class: /SAPAPO/CL_EXM_IM_AM_ALERTLIST

See also: Enhancing Alerts in Alert Monitor

Br,

Geri

entry.title: Re: Incoming payment from a multi-currencues BP
entry.content:
Hi,

if customer is not making payment in full against these invoices you can mention the amount to be allocated in the invoice row selected. SAP has given a provision to enter partial amount.

Else, in the payment means window, using shortcut key Ctrl + B will give you the total receivable automatically.

In the payment means window itself, there is a field to enter the exchange rate prevailing at the time of receiving payment. 

System will calculate the exchange rate difference as gain / loss appropriately.

And the invoices will be affected in term of balance due as per the amount received. The total amount paid or due in respect of invoice currency will not change. The impact will be visible in ageing report. 

By default the outstanding will be shown at the exchange rate mentioned in the document. By using the option Translate Leading Currency at Aging Date you can check.

Hope this helps

Regards

entry.title: Re: The RFC does not receive the values passed in when ca...
entry.content:
Hi,

There is typo mistake. Use V_VBELN instead of VBELN and V_USNAM instead of USNAM while calling the RFC in your program.

 

Regards,

Vikash Ranjan

entry.title: Re: is the Entitlement Management system customizable?
entry.content:
Both Entitlement Model and entitlement master data support user to add customized attribute. Please refer to below help to do the configuration, so that EMS could capture your customized info.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ENTITLEMENT_MANAGEMENT/c8403d8ad9334b2094b81ed605020727/14758f35a0014771be93f90d860bf578.html?locale=en-US

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ENTITLEMENT_MANAGEMENT/c8403d8ad9334b2094b81ed605020727/261807206c7d41939e5403d797991e32.html?locale=en-US

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ENTITLEMENT_MANAGEMENT/c8403d8ad9334b2094b81ed605020727/4999032cd2df4dd499a540bf47907aab.html?locale=en-US

Br,

Lambert Chen

entry.title: Re: Can we Activate Budget Availability Control for ACDOC...
entry.content:
Hi Abhinav,

1) Can we Activate Budget Availability Control for ACDOCP Table for Projects in S/4 HANA 2023 private Cloud?

2) If yes, can we achive functionalities of Buget Transfer/Budget release/Budget supplimentals also from ACDOCP table?

4) Can we completely get rid of Old tables and move to combination of ACDOCP Table & ACDOCA tables going forward ?

Or can anyone please explain how is sap planning the Budget Availability Control for ACDOCP Table via ACDOCP Table?

No, Availability Control based on ACDOCP is not yet supported for projects in OP/private cloud. It is planned to include this feature as part of the roadmap, but at the moment there is not yet a timeline or defined scope.

When using transfer from PPM you can however use the transfer into the "old" tables (BPGE, BPJA) in addition to the ACDOCP transfer, with that you could use AVC and have the values in ACDOCP.

 

3) If SAC is used for budget planning, are the values stored in ACDOCP Table and can we use the availability control from SAC in that case ?

The Portfolio financial planning content https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/42093f14b43c485fbe3adbbe81eff6c8/fef35a05181f4b5f879734708fc87433.html is leveraging the ACDOCP API, so same as described above. If you need AVC, you could consider using additionally export to the classic tables.

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud Access using IAS as Proxy but no use...
entry.content:
Hi all!

The customer does not want users to be created in the Cloud Identity Store > is no longer a valid objection.

Honestly, I can’t hear it anymore. It is the responsibility of SAP consultants to convey to companies that user persistence in the IdDS is necessary to ensure future readiness. Please just keep that in mind. #nodiscussionsaboutpersistingusersintheIdDS 😅

To underline this here is a quote from the current framework CIO Guide: Identity Lifecycle in SAP Landscapes Focusing on Identity and Access Management Services | Source

"To utilize new applications and features in SAP BTP, it is essential that the Identity Directory in SAP Cloud Identity Services includes all relevant users. Currently, almost all SAP applications and each SAP BTP subaccount maintain their own user stores. This legacy setup complicates remote management and compliance. The rapid development of cloud technologies has introduced various software stacks and methods of interacting with these user stores. SAP’s strategy aims to simplify this complexity through SAP Cloud Identity Services in the long term. The objective is to centralize user and group management within SAP Cloud Identity Services, enabling remote management of the entire SAP cloud landscape using APIs. New applications and SAP BTP features necessitate that users are present in the Identity Directory. To utilize these features, the Identity Directory must be populated with all relevant users, facilitating functions such as assigning policies through the Authorization Management service. While the initial setup of SAP Cloud Identity Services for the first application might require additional effort, it significantly reduces the workload for subsequent applications, as there will be no need to populate additional application-specific user stores."

In recent years, SAP has been executing a strategy to centralize IAM through SAP Cloud Identity Services. Many SAP solutions are already integrated and bundled through this service, and we plan to continue this integration journey.

Integration and extension capabilities will continue to improve in future releases of services for managing identities in intelligent enterprises. Your toolset for handling complex landscapes and third-party integrations will expand, providing a smoother user experience. In summary, a key strategy at SAP is to enhance existing solutions to offer consistent security and identity management capabilities for intelligent enterprises, ultimately aiming for seamless integration across your entire enterprise. Future improvements in identity and access management will enable security and integration by default, with preconfiguration and automation to manage authentication, authorization, and governance efficiently.

entry.title: Re: Pricing problem in Commerce Cloud with CPS
entry.content:
Hi Benedikt,
I suppose this is about the Spartacus frontend, correct?
Where exactly are you missing the prices?
If I read this correctly, the prices are available on the configuration overview page, where the configuration summary is displayed.
Is the price summary present on the configuration page (where you enter the attribute values)? Or are you missing the delta prices displayed along with the attribute values?

Best regards,
Christoph

entry.title: Re: Calling a BAPI inside a BADI
entry.content:
I had googled and came to know that we are not supposed to call BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT in the BADI when we call a BAPI within it.

Commit Work related to the BADI will take care of the COMMIT and there is no need to call the BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT specifically which may result in dump sometimes.

Are there any advantages/disadvantages/other pitfalls that you experts are aware of. Thanks.

K.Kiran.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for international trade vs SAP Global Trade Services
entry.content:
Hi Derrick,

Hope this might help you and not sure whether I am right or wrong. 🙂

IMG - Financial Accounting - Tax on Sales/Purchases - Basic Settings -

Under each Region/country - example India - Goods & Services Tax - General Settings - Maintain HSN & SAV.   Table details: V_T604F

Ref. Screenshots:

HSN code (Control Code) @ IMGControl Code in Material Master - Int. Trade Import , Export

 

Table view for the control code shown in material master

Regards,

Ramana Rao.

entry.title: Re: One Delivery and 2 Separate Sales Invoices - SAP Busi...
entry.content:
Hi,

Standard SAP will not allow this. Relationship between Delivery and invoice will no longer exist the moment you change the business partner.

This can be addressed as follows: - 

1. create a stand alone invoice in the name of second customer and attach the delivery document in the referenced document under accounting tab and then the data can be pulled with the help of custom report and open quantities to be controlled through TN.

There is no other way to handle this.

Regards

entry.title: Re: How to attach documents to a Journal Entry within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud from ABAP.
entry.content: Thank you, with the communication agreement, we resolve it

entry.title: Re: Gr processing time in Purchase order
entry.content:
Hi @AAkash1 

No, that's not possible - if it were, it would make scheduling go back in time. That's not possible unless in

You said you use GR processing time "to fake a Md04 report" - that doesn't sound right to fake anything in SAP. 

If you describe your process and requirements in more detailed, maybe a more standard solution could be found.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: PO save with "Duplicate owners: Contact LO-VC development" ABAP dump
entry.content:
When changing Tradename on a PO from Material data tab, I got an ABAP run time error when try to save the PO.

Short text of the error message
Duplicate owners: Contact LO-V
Long text of the error message
Technical information about th
Message class....... CUIB1
Number.............. 699
Variable 1..........
Variable 2..........
Variable 3..........
Variable 4.......... " "

Strange thing is it only happens to one specific PO, while everything works fine to all other POs (with exactly the same information, like supplier, material code, plant code, etc.)

There was no issue at all when changing tradename to other POs and save, but dump occurs every time when trying to save this particular PO, they were all processed by the same user.

Referred to note 610828, 537250 and 510129, it seems they are not applicable to what I am facing with the PO.

Anyone has any ideas?

Thanks in advance.

Br,

Tori Ji

entry.title: Subitem Generation is not happening in Location/Product Substitution
entry.content:
Hi Collegue,

Currently we are facing an issue in Alternative Based Confirmation functionality of aATP, where we choose option for “Substitution Item Type”= Force Subitem Generation, aATP doesn’t work at all and even the subitem doesn’t generate.

This issue is for both substitution method such as Plant & Product Substitution.

As we are aware there is something related to below Item Category Determination, where TAPA is supposed to be Main Item and TAN is supposed to be Sub Item.

 

But unfortunately, it’s not working as expected, Moreover I was wondering, about the above Item Category Usage, is there is some other customization which we are missing, because we followed every steps from SAPhelp and didn’t found any setting related to Item Category Usage.

Ex:- Below is the example, where Material TG11 doesn’t have stock in plant 1090, and we have selected substitution method Force Subitem Generation. We have created the Plant Substitution as per below, if there is stock shortage in Plant 1090, it should automatically substitute to Plant 1010.

 

But Unfortunately nothing happens, even ATP check doesn’t occurs.

 

 

Requesting SAP Pioneers to please help and let us know, how to achieve the Product/Location Substitution with Sub Item Generation.

Referred Additional blog highlighted below:-

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/alternative-based-confirmation-activation/ba-p/13547614

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/alternative-based-confirmation-an-overview/ba-p/13546290

 

Note:- We are using new release system of SAP S/4 2022/2023 and it’s not working in both the systems.

@n_k_m @Andreas_Krause @Mrinal_K_Roy

entry.title: SAP STAMMTISCH - 22nd June 2024
entry.content:
We are a week to go for our yet another STAMMTISCH event of the year- 2024 !!!

So those who missed to visit the last SAP event at Kolkata, definitely can not miss our next Sap Stammtisch Kolkata on 22nd June, 2024 (Saturday)
Time: 3 PM to 6 PM

*Session topics:*

1. SAP TM
2. ⁠SAP ABAP HR
3. ⁠BTP
4. ⁠Knowledge Graph and much more

As we always mention, this event will help freshers to start their Career in SAP & SAP experienced people to share & upskill their knowledge.

Join us for the upcoming SAP Stammtisch event, and keep your community networking and learning strong !
Do join the SAP Community Kolkata Group to connect with local peers, share your experience / knowledge and enhance your skills.

P.S.- All the confirmed participants who have registered for this event will receive e-mail from the Community e-mail address with venue and other information. Check your email inbox and mail spambox for the confirmation mail. Participants must carry one government ID proof as a verification protocol. Thank you everyone for all your support.

entry.title: OEE KPI Calculation report for discrete manufacturing in SAP Digital Manufacturing.
entry.content:
Title: OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness)KPI Calculation report for discrete manufacturing in SAP Digital Manufacturing.

Introduction

SAP Digital Manufacturing provides important feature to create OEE KPI Calculation report for discrete manufacturing in SAP Digital Manufacturing. In SAP DM ,OEE is a matric which is measuring manufacturing performance . You can calculate the overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) using the Availability, Performance, and Quality Key Performance Indicators (KPIs). OEE metric measures availability and performance of equipment and the quality of goods produced by that equipment. OEE allows to measure and analyze plant performance both in real-time and historically and OEE utilizes common sources of manufacturing data to obtain metrics.

OEE is defined as the product of three KPIs:

Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) = Availability X Performance X Quality

Here we are considering a short definition of the input parameters:

  • Availability-The ratio of the amount of time a resource was productive to the amount of time the resource was expected to be productive.
  • Performance-The ratio of the amount of time needed to produce good and bad quality items to the amount of time that would have been needed to produce these items based on the designed speed.
  • Quality-The ratio of time needed to produce good quality products to the total number of quantities produced (yield and scrap).

Availability KPI

 

 

The Theoretically Available Time of our resource is 9 hours. There's one scheduled down of 1 hour planned during the shift. Moreover, because of an operator's mistake, the resource is down for 2 hours.

  • Theoretically Available Time = 9 hours
  • Loading Time = 9 hours - 1 hour (scheduled down) = 8 hours
  • Running Time = 8 hours - 2 hour (unscheduled down) = 6 hours

Availability KPI Formula

  • Availability = Running Time / Loading Time x 100%
  • Availability = 6 hours / 8 hours x 100% = 75%

Performance KPI

 

The main purpose of the Performance KPI is to compare the actual production speed to the designed production speed.

The Total Production Time is 10 hours. During this time, there's one unscheduled down of 1 hour and one scheduled down of 1 hour. The designed speed (standard rate) is of 1 item per hour. The target quantity for the 8 hour shift is 8 items. During the shift, the actual production quantity is of 6 items (yield and scrap).

Total Production Time = 10 hours

Net Production Time = Total Production Time - Downtime = 10 hours - 2 hours = 8 hours

Net Operating Time = Actual Quantities Produced (yield and scrap) x Standard Rate = 6 x 1 = 6 hours

Speed Loss = Net Production Time - Net Operating Time = 8 hours - 6 hours = 2 hours

Performance = Net Operating Time / Net Production Time x 100%

E.g. Performance = 6 hours / 8 hours x 100%= 75%

Quality KPI

 

The Total Production Time is 10 hours. During this time, there's one unscheduled down of 1 hour and one scheduled down of 1 hour. The designed speed (standard rate) is of 1 item per hour. The target quantity for the 8 hours shift is 8 items. During the shift, the actual production quantity is of 6 items (yield and scrap), of which 4 meet the quality standards.

Total Production Time = 10 hours

Net Production Time = Total Production Time - Downtime = 10 hours - 2 hours = 8 hours

Net Operating Time = Actual Quantities Produced (yield and scrap) x Standard Rate = 6 x 1 = 6 hours

Speed Loss = Net Production Time - Net Operating Time = 8 hours - 6 hours = 2 hours

Quality Loss = (Actual Quantity - Quality Output) x Standard Rate = (6 items - 4 items) x 1 hour / item = 2 hours

Value Operating Time = Net Operating Time - Quality Loss = 6 hours - 2 hours = 4 hours

Quality = Value Operating Time / Net Operating Time x 100%

Quality = 4 hours / 6 hours x 100%= 66,6%

Here we are considering the Work Center POD and Line Monitor POD .Line Monitor POD is using to display OEE report and WC POD is using to execute the SAP DM manufacturing on Discrete Industry .

SAP DM Execution:

We are considering the below SAP Digital manufacturing execution steps for discrete industry.

  1. WC POD
  2. SFC Start
  3. Data collection
  4. Create Downtime
  5. SFC Complete
  6. LM POD open and check OEE calculation
  7. Another SFC Start
  8. Nonconformance
  9. Scarp the SFC
  10. Again, LM POD open and check OEE calculation

Pre-requisites:

We are considering the below apps and activities.

  1. Work Center POD
  2. Line Monitor POD
  3. Manage OEE Time Model Configuration App
  4. Manage OEE Reason Codes App
  5. Assign OEE Reason Codes App
  6. Manage Standard Rates App
  7. Manage Resources App

Configuration Steps:

The following are the required configuration steps to use OEE:

  1. Define Work Center and Resources
  2. Assign Resource Status to Time Element Types
  3. Define Time Elements and Assign to Time Element Types
  4. Define Reason Codes and Assign to Time Elements
  5. Assign Reason Codes to Resources
  6. Define Standard Rates at Resources
  7. Define Shifts and Assign to Resources

 

   

 

Step 1- Assign resource status to OEE time element types.

The resource status behavior should affect the OEE KPI calculation by mapping the relevant resource statuses with OEE time element types.

OEE time element types are pre-delivered. A default mapping of these time element types to resource status is also pre-delivered.

Manage OEE Time Model Configuration app

Time Elements - Time elements help in analyzing losses at various levels and help to classify the losses which form the root node of the reason code hierarchy.

At first define Time Element and then assign it to Time Element Type. You can create a new time element (for example define time element ID UNSCD_<your ID> for the time element description Unscheduled Down) and assign it to the time element type and after mapping time element to time element type, and the time element is used for tagging, you must not change the time element.

You can assign time elements to Scheduled Down (SCHED_DOWN), Unscheduled Down (UNSCD_DOWN), Speed Loss (SPEED_LOSS), and Quality Loss (QUAL_LOSS).

Create Time Elements –Click on Add button and provide the Time Element ID and Description and Save it.

 

Click on the Time Element Type ID like  SCHED_DOWN and assign the Time element for SCHED_DOWN

 

 

 

 

Click on Manage Assignment button.

 

 

Check and Save

 

 

 

Add the Time Elements if elements are not available. If Time elements are enabled then you can assign to Time Element Types

 

 

Step 2- Manage OEE Reason Codes app

Define the reason code and assign to the Time Elements

 

Select the  row and add reason code

 

 

Step 3-Assign OEE Reason Codes App

Click on Assign and assign the reason code to the Resource.

 

 

 

Step 4-Define Standard Rates at Resources -Manage Standard Rate App

Click on Add button and give the values

 

Step 5-Define KPI Targets at Resource Level

Specify target values of the OEE KPIs to determine a KPI's state, whether green, yellow, or red, at a resource.

By default, the target values of the OEE, Availability, Performance, and Quality KPIs at a resource are defined as 70, 90, and 100. As per the requirement, you can enter custom target values for the KPIs in the Custom Data section of the Manage Resources app. Custom values override default values.

Manage Resources App - By default, the target values of the OEE, Availability, Performance, and Quality KPIs at a resource are defined as 70, 90, and 100

 

 

SAP DM Execution:

We are considering the below SAP Digital manufacturing execution steps for discrete industry.

  1. WC POD
  2. SFC Start
  3. Data collection
  4. Create Downtime
  5. SFC Complete
  6. LM POD open and check OEE calculation

Step-I – Start the SFC

Open the WC POD and start the sfc.

 

 

Click on Start button to start the SFC

 

 

 

Step-II - Perform the data collection

Click on the Data Collection List Activity and then click on the Collect button.

 

 

Collect the data as Boolean value and click on Save button

 

Once performed the data collection

 

Step-III- Create Down Time

Click on Downtime Activity

Click on Create Downtime button.

 

 

 

Select Resource and resource status

 

 

Select Reason Code

 

Give Start time ,End time , comments and click on Save button.

 

 

 

Step-IV – SFC Complete

Now complete the SFC. Click on the Comple button.

 

 

SFC is completed

 

 

Step-V Open LM POD to check OEE report

Asset details

 

 

 

OEE details

 

 

Similarly Start another SFC and Scrap the sfc using scrap nonconformance code and check OEE report.

 

Start  SFC

 

 

Click on Nonconformance activity and Scrap the sfc

 

 

Check OEE report

 

 

 

Conclusion

In conclusion, OEE KPI Calculation report is playing as an important key role for discrete manufacturing in SAP Digital Manufacturing. Using OEE matric, you can measure manufacturing performance . You can calculate the overall equipment effectiveness (OEE) using the Availability, Performance, and Quality Key Performance Indicators (KPIs). OEE allows to measure and analyze plant performance both in real-time and historically.

If you have any questions, please share your comments on answer questions section and any feedback is highly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Shared contract
entry.content:
Hello,

According to your description, the activation of the provider contract is sending allowance event to a shared allowance which has been created by the provider contract  26. 

Due to a No Access Function that you have set in the rating logic of the shared allowance, the activation is failed. This is expected as soon as the rating on the shared allowance is reaching a "noAccess" component. 

The main advice is to not use "noAccess" component in your allowance logic.  Consider this specific component as an technical error component which has to be used only to highlight provisioning issue (missing subscriber table, ...) . It should not be used in a business logic.  

Best regards,

Eric F.

entry.title: Re: The RFC does not receive the values passed in when ca...
entry.content:
Thomas‘ answer is correct. 
the parameters are named „V_VBELN“, not ‚VBELN‘.

Is you are running ATC check, you will find errors like this easily.

regards

entry.title: Re: Print GS1-128 Bar code using adobe forms
entry.content:
Hey,

did you solve this?

Im currently facing the same problem.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP
entry.content:
Hello Anil,

In a managed scenario, the RAP (Restful ABAP Programming) framework handles most of the tasks for you. This includes CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations, numbering, and saving.

  • CRUD Operations: In managed RAP BOs, developers do not need to implement CRUD operations. For example, in an update operation, the RAP BO instance data to be updated is automatically read into the transactional buffer, updated there, and then saved to the database without any custom development needed.

  • Numbering: In a managed RAP BO, the key is automatically created by the framework, which only works if the key is of a certain type (16-character byte-like UUID).

However, there are some exceptions where you would need to write your own code:

  • Determinations and Validations: The behavior of a RAP BO usually requires some additional implementations, even in the context of managed RAP BOs. Those non-standard operations must be self-implemented in ABAP behavior pools.

  • Unmanaged operations must be provided by developers in an ABAP behavior implementation:
    • Additional Save: For additional save, you would need to write code in their respective implementation classes.
    • Unmanaged Save: For unmanaged save, you would need to write code in their respective implementation classes.

You can refer to this cheat sheet: ABAP for RAP: Entity Manipulation Language (ABAP EML)

Best regards,
Peter

entry.title: Table name in SAP for all attributes of NX CAD
entry.content:
Hi there,

I need the location or table name in SAP where the attribute value of constraints used in NX - CAD is stored

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Re: OOABAP
entry.content:
a. Class constructor of super1

d. Class constructor of sub1.

b. Instance constructor of sub1

c. Instance constructor of super 1

entry.title: Can we add more decimal places for invoices and quantities in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi all, 

My questions here is twofold:

1) Is it possibles to have decimal places for quantities where we have up to 5 digits after comma?

2) Is it possible to have material prices with 6 digits after the comma? Also showing up like this on invoices etc.

entry.title: SAP STAMMTISCH Kolkata - 2024 (H2)
entry.content:
We are 3 days to go for our yet another STAMMTISCH event of the year- 2024 !!!

So those who missed to visit the last SAP event at Kolkata, definitely can not miss our next Sap Stammtisch Kolkata on 22nd June, 2024 (Saturday)
Time: 3 PM to 6 PM

*Session topics:*

1. SAP TM
2. ⁠SAP ABAP HR
3. ⁠BTP
4. ⁠Knowledge Graph and much more

As we always mention, this event will help freshers to start their Career in SAP & SAP experienced people to share & upskill their knowledge.

Join us for the upcoming SAP Stammtisch event, and keep your community networking and learning strong !
Do join the SAP Community Kolkata Group to connect with local peers, share your experience / knowledge and enhance your skills.

P.S.- All the confirmed participants who have registered for this event will receive e-mail from the Community e-mail address with venue and other information. Check your email inbox and mail spambox for the confirmation mail. Participants must carry one government ID proof as a verification protocol. Thank you everyone for all your support.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to call a fix URL from IW52 trasnaction (Adding a cutom button there)?
entry.content: You don't understand, "call the URL" is completely unclear, it means two different things and two different solutions. If you don't understand please show the customer requirement or ask and revert back.

entry.title: Re: How to input Internal Table as a Parameter for execut...
entry.content:
Hello @nadirelc ,

The causes regarding the internal tables, that i can think are :
1. The internal tables are hashed or sorted or contain secondary keys. The itabs should be standard without secondary keys

2. Incorrect type mapping from ABAP itab to Oracle array. 

3. Incorrect column name mapping from ABAP itab to Oracle array. In abap column names contain only capital letters whereas in oracle can contain lowercase letters.

entry.title: Static factory action doesn’t appear on the table toolbar
entry.content:
Hi all

I have defined a static factory action in the behavior definition as follows:

In the behavior projection, it is also enabled:


Here is how the static factory action is annotated in the meta extension

However, the action button does not appear at all on the app. Normally, it should appear in the Table Toolbar.

I also checked the metadata, and it seems to be correct:


I would greatly appreciate any assistance.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: How to Link OINV AND ARCT
entry.content:
Thanks for the information.

For others' reference, the below joins should help you:

SELECT *

FROM ORCT as T1

LEFT JOIN RCT2 as T2 ON T1.DocNum = T2.DocNum AND T2.InvType = 13

LEFT JOIN OINV as T3 ON T2.DocEntry = T3.DocEntry

entry.title: Re: SAP Group Reporting - Different Consolidation Methods...
entry.content:
It depends on the details.

With what you give as examples I would recommend defining different consolidation groups and stay in a single version.

If there are additional requirements such as the need to have different processes, different valuations on company level you may want to consider different versions, e.g. extension versions.

Hope this helps.

entry.title: confirmed quantity still exists after goods issue
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

I want to ask you, what are the reasons if the confirmed quantity of a material is not going to zero after the goods issue has been executed.? I did the goods issue of the material in MIGO. The withdrawn quantity increased, but the confirmed quantity is still the same. Stock has been reduced and the reservation is completed.

What am I missing here? Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: TTA for SAP integrated with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello,

There are not predefined test cases for Tricentis.
You can create reusable test steps, and they can be reused to create Automated  Tests.
This would mean you don't always have to start from scratch, but have predefined building blocks based on your test steps.

You can use SAP Processes or your custom processes to create Tests

These two links will be helpful 

This is a link to the USage right - https://support.sap.com/en/alm/usage-rights.html?anchorId=section_138430085

This is a link to a Webinar on Tricentis Presented by the Development Business owner for Test Management in SAP Cloud ALM. It will give you a great overview of the product and how it is used  in SAP Cloud ALM - https://sapvideo.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/?entry_id=1_0m960nfa&trk=article-ssr-frontend-pulse_little-text-block

Regards,

Paul Babier

entry.title: Problem registering my desktop agent in my BTP Build Process Automation Trial Account
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm facing an issue while registering my Desktop agent in my BTP Trial Build Process Automation App.

I followed the SAP Developers Guide to set up the agent locally on my PC, and I enabled the Chrome and Edge extensions to try and connect the agent with my trial app. However, I encounter a problem when clicking on the agent in the control tower to get the information needed to register it with my local desktop agent.

It loads for hours without any response. I thought it might be due to my internet connection, but nothing changed after switching to another Wi-Fi network.

Can you please help me set this up?

Thanks,
Ilyass

entry.title: Re: Relationship between ORCT and OINV
entry.content: Hi, I think matching TC0."DocNum" = TC1."DocNum" would be better because sometimes DocNum and DocEntry of a single record are different

entry.title: Re: Calling a BAPI inside a BADI
entry.content: So, if you are not supposed to do something, why do you ask if there is an advantage or drawback, instead the question would be "why should you not call a BAPI inside a BAdI?" (it's not needed to ask because you have the answer)

entry.title: While confirming any production order in SAP 210 in Tcode CO11n, I am getting this error "System er
entry.content: While confirming any production order in SAP 210 in Tcode CO11n,  I am getting this error "System error: Capacity with ID 10000078 was not found.

entry.title: Re: Semi-automatic custom code adaptation for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi Olga,

I applied some of these quickfixes but stumbled across the fact that cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_time( ) is not identical to the former sy-uzeit if the system timezone in TTZCU is not equal UTC.

  • sy-uzeit does return the real system time in the time zone of the system.
  • get_system_time( ) is always returning the UTC time.

As a result, programm logic can change unintentionally (time comparisons are incorrect) and errors can occur. For this reason in my opinion, you should not use the quick fixes without checking them thoroughly.

Kind Regards,

Juergen

entry.title: How to pass values from List Report page to object page
entry.content: I've a requirement, where while navigating from fiori list report page to object page, need to pass one value, and then based on that value i need to display data over object page, how to achieve the same?

entry.title: Re: Gr processing time in Purchase order
entry.content:
Thanks for your comments.

My process is 

  • Purchase order is created 
  • We create inbound delivery with dates for example 20.08.2024 (Date/Month/Year)
  • We do a rough goods receipt, not actual. Its just a way to tell purchasing department that material has arrived at the warehouse location. (Not actual GR).
  • We update the goods receipt processing time to 4 days, for example if material has arrived 24.08.2024 and it will update MD04 inbound delivery date to 24.08.2024
  • Problem is that if inbound delivery date is 1.08.2024 and if we received delivery before that date for example 31.07.2024, our process doesn't work because now the difference is in negative , hence MD04 report doesn't get updated.

entry.title: How to remove watermark and enable footer for Monthly Invoice PDF form?
entry.content:
The watermark "Test Copy" appears on form of Monthly Invoice. And there is no footer appears on form of Monthly Invoice.

How to remove watermark "TEST COPY" and enable footer for Monthly Invoice PDF form?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to remove watermark and enable footer for Monthly...
entry.content:
To remove "TEST COPY" from monthly invoice form and enable footer:

  1. Open the app Maintain Form Templates, go to tab Predelivered Templates.
  2. Search form template ISJP_MONTHLY_INVFP, click it and get in the detail page.
  3. Click Download button, select APOC_DEMO_FORM_MASTER_JP in the popup dialog and press ok.
  4. Open APOC_DEMO_FORM_MASTER_JP.xdp after unzip via Adobe LiveCycle Designer.
  5. Remove $.FormMaster.WatermarkText from the Data Binding of txtWatermark on both FirstPage and SubsequentPage under Portrait_factsheet page.
  6. Add "$.FooterBlock1Text" for the data binding of txt line of footer blocks for first and subsequent page.
  7. Save form example YY1_ APOC_FORM_MASTER_JP_CHANGED.xdp.
  8. In the app Maintain Form Templates.
  9. Click on New, enter values for Form Template Name, Language.
  10. Select Form Template File Name: For example: YY1_APOC_FORM_MASTER_JP_CHANGED.xdp
    Data Source: FDP_OM_FORM_MASTER_SRV
    Form Type :Master
  11. Create the following new content via configuration activity Define Rules for Determination of Master Form Template (ID: 101184). 
  12. Based on this customizing,  the new upload master form is linked to monthly invoice form ISJP_MONTHLY_INVFP
    (For ISJP_MONTHLY_INVFP, it is predelivered templates with default configuration, there is no need to associate it to form template master APOC_DEMO_FORM_MASTER_JP again in SSCUI 101184. The rule needs to be maintained in SSCUI if a new Form Template Master is created.).
  13. Based on those changes, retest the monthly invoice cases in the app Invoice Summary Processing. There is no watermark in new PDF generation.
  14. See blog Output Management – Customize Content Form for Outgoing Check regarding Q to P transport steps.

You can refer to the KBA 3483845 - How to remove watermark "TEST COPY" and enable footer for Monthly Invoice PDF form - SAP for Me for reference.

entry.title: Re: Change in Reference number - After RERAPP
entry.content:
Hi Siva,

Please use BADI_RERA_DOC to control the reference number.

Best regards,

Achyuth.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: That is great! Maybe you also want to connect with @jgleichmann who is managing the Bamberg Group! 🙂

entry.title: New certification available! SAP Data Engineer - Data Fabric for SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Analytics professionals,   

After the release of the new certification for SAP Analytics Cloud and a new certification for SAP HANA, it is time to continue our new role-based certification transformation with SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Datasphere. 

The new Data Engineer - Data Fabric certification targets all consultants who work with data acquisition and modeling an application layer in a Cloud or on-premise data warehouse.   

This comprehensive certification is designed to equip data engineers with the skills and knowledge required to master SAP's cutting-edge data management solutions. 

What does this certification cover? 

🔹 SAP Datasphere including SAP BW bridge - Gain expertise in leveraging SAP Datasphere for a unified and agile data fabric architecture. 

🔹 SAP BW/4HANA - Dive deep into the advanced capabilities of SAP BW/4HANA, optimizing data warehousing and business intelligence.  

As data engineers, understanding the full spectrum of SAP's data management tools is crucial for driving efficient and innovative data solutions. This certification ensures you stay ahead in the ever-evolving SAP ecosystem. 

If you like to use the advanced features of SAP BW/4HANA or the flexible modeling possibilities of SAP Datasphere, if you are an expert in performance optimization and authorization topics, the SAP Certified Associate – Data Engineer - Data Fabric, is the right certification for you to verify that you possess the core knowledge of these disciplines.    

To prepare for the certification, you have a lot of free content available: 

Implementing Authorizations in SAP BW/4HANA 

Implementing Data Provisioning in SAP BW/4HANA 

Creating Queries in SAP BW/4HANA 

Modeling in SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge 

Implementing Modeling Scenarios in SAP BW/4HANA 

Implementing a Data Warehouse Using SAP BW/4HANA 

Exploring SAP Datasphere 

Getting Started building an on-premise Data Warehouse using SAP BW/4HANA 

Ready to take your data engineering career to the next level? Explore the certification details and get started today!

Product Learning Analytics Team

entry.title: Re: Outbound Communication to S4 On-Premise(OData) from B...
entry.content:
@Ulrich_SchmidtYou are absolutely right , i missed the entry in Audit. 😞 😥

The quick/dirty fix will work but i have configured my Communication System to talk to backend via Cloud Connector (I have switched it off while creating the system)

My understanding was it wont use the destination service rather route the request via virtual host mentioned in SAP CC Access Control. Cockpit/Destination , as you mentioned in your reply have "http" but will it be relevant since i have switched off in Communcation System.

You mentioned "Some component along the line HTTP Client --> Connectivity Agent(Proxy) --> SCC --> Backend needs to be fixed." 
Are you talking about something in SCC Settings or Server related settings in S4 Backend system? Do we have some Apps or  Eclipse ADT steps to configure something at ABAP Cloud in BTP ?

Only BTP configuration that we do is Communication system/Arrangement. Is there anything else in ABAP Cockpit i can leverage for trouble shooting this redirect?

Thanks a lot for your response .

entry.title: Re: Writing month values (got from a Form in a story) via...
entry.content: Hi William, yes correct our model is a combination of "cost centers" and "accounts" for our cost center planning. This combination got no data on opening the story because there is no data stored. Now i added a button to open a form that populates the cost center and possible accounts so they dont need to add a new "row" in the story itself and dont get any help of selecting the correct entry (like typos). In addition to that they add values for each month and those values i want to store in my model (in LC). Ill add some screenshots in a seperate post.

entry.title: How it's like beeing a "Top ABAP Blogger"
entry.content:
Hey, apparently, I am one of the "Top Authors, Journalists, and Publishers covering ABAP."
Thank you random page on the internet, what an honour! 🙂

...and to answer the question: it's quite niece! 🙂

What top list are you on?best
Joachim

A screenshot from a browser, URL is https://developer.feedspot.com/abap_blogs/. There is a table, captioned: "ABAP Bloggers Top Authors, Journalists, and Publishers covering ABAP." All names in the liste are blurred, except for one, with is the name of this toots author. Behind, it says blogs.sap.com and the numer 2 (indicating that 2 blogs where published). The caption and and the line with the name are highlightend with a thin, rectangular, red frame.

entry.title: Re: Pricing problem in Commerce Cloud with CPS
entry.content:
Hi Christoph,

no, this is still the old accelerator frontend.

We are missing the pricing during the configuration:

We don't see neither the price options during the configuration nor an calculated total base price or total price for selected options (even though it is returned in the answer).
On the "Review your selections" page we see a base price and and a current total (but still no price for selected options)

entry.title: Re: ADT Data Preview pobug when selecting columns
entry.content: Can I open a ticket? Is that even possible?

entry.title: Re: How to manage prepaid use case in Subscription Billing?
entry.content:
Hi,

if an allowance has been fully consumed, you need to create a new allowance for the "recharge". Subscription Billing does not support the process of updating the balance of an existing allowance. This has the advantage that you don't need to worry about an existing allowance being invoiced again. The consumed allowance stays in status "Used Up", and the new allowance will be invoiced. You can use our allowance threshold notification to trigger the degradation of the internet speed.

For more information about allowance events, kindly visit our documentation using the following links:

https://api.sap.com/event/SAPSubscriptionBillingBusinessEvents_AllowanceEvents/resource

https://help.sap.com/docs/subscription-billing/apis-events/allowance-events?locale=en-US

Be aware that the use of our notifications requires a separate license for SAP Event Mesh.

Kind regards,

Annette

entry.title: Re: how to make line of business mandatory in incoming pa...
entry.content: Thank you for your reply

entry.title: Re: how to make line of business mandatory in incoming pa...

entry.title: Re: Using Restrictions to Enhance User Authorizations in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition
entry.content:
Hi George
Best Blog about BR ever seen!
I have some questions.
①Do we only can maintain the field under the "Assigned Restriction Types"?   
I mean if I want to create a BR which makes user can not write in "Maintain Business Partner" but not affect other write function in other APPs?
Is finding the field which presents the WRITE function the only way to make it?
②If I find a APP in a catalog assigned to a user is not needed(other APPS in this catalog is needed), is there any way to make this APP disappear or make user can not enter this APP?

Many thanks
Zhou

entry.title: All permission removed after adding common super domain permission
entry.content:
Hi,

We have experienced an issue in role-based permissions when adding the common super domain permission. After we added the permission to the permission role and saved the changes, all the other permissions were removed.

Are there more people who might have experienced the same problem? Can this be a known bug?

Best regards, Thomas

entry.title: Buyer block, but must allow management of PO in progress.
entry.content:
Good morning,

SAP MM / HANA, If a PO has a blocked supplier (the blocking has been done after the creation of the order), the system must allow managing all pending documents (Changes in the order, Confirmation, PL, Booking, Invoice, etc...)

That is to say, the system must block new orders, but must allow management of those in progress.

Is this possible ?

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Check change history for the customer master
entry.content: Hi Johan, I quickly checked by changing street, email and phone number. All these changes are shown in the report in the section General data.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hi Steffen,

welcome to the community. We have some people joining the Bamberg Stammtisch from Coburg, Kronach and other areas nearby. If you are interested I can send you an invitation to the next Stammtisch.

Regards,

Jens

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors HCM: Continuous Quality Checks
entry.content:
The SAP Enterprise Support portfolio of assets, services and tools can help you transform, adopt, integrate and extend your SAP SuccessFactors solutions. You have available a range of deliverables including empowerment assets, expert guidance and collaboration, innovation and value realization services and tools, and the mission critical support digital experience.

With regards to SAP SuccessFactors, one of the key assets I would like to highlight are the Continuous Quality Check services (or CQC services for short).

In general, continuous quality check and improvement services from SAP connect you with an SAP Expert. This person will analyze your system and/or situation based on real life data from your systems or solution. After each service, you receive a service report with an executive summary, findings and a detailed action plan to mitigate risks or improve your situation.

For SAP SuccessFactors we have the following:

CQC for deployment readiness for SAP SuccessFactors HCM Suite
This service is designed to provide a key settings review before the go-live. During this remote service, an analysis of the SAP SuccessFactors tenant is performed and recommendations for optimal configuration are given in alignment with SAP best practices.

Service can be used:

  • Before the go-live of a new SAP SuccessFactors implementation.
  • When additional modules are added to the existing SAP SuccessFactors solution
  • As a “health check” for productive SAP SuccessFactors systems.

Service cannot be used:

  • If you have issues with specific business processes
  • if you require a design review or if you require consulting expertise.

Please check the service infosheet in SAP Support Portal to learn about the scope, key features and benefits of this service, when to use it or not and further details of the delivery.

CQC Going Live Support
The continuous quality check (CQC) for going-live support service for SAP SuccessFactors performs a complete monitoring of your BizX tenant during the go-live and provides an analysis of the key performance indicators. The aim of this service is to:

  • Safeguard the SAP SuccessFactors HCM Suite go-live.
  • Minimize potential risks of critical go-lives.
  • Provide high-level support in case of unforeseen incidents during go-live.

Please check the service infosheet in SAP Support Portal to learn about the scope, key features and benefits of this service, when to use it or not and further details of the delivery.

CQC for interface management for SAP SuccessFactors HCM Suite

The continuous quality check (CQC) for interface management focuses on the evaluation of potential risks of key interfaces between SAP S/4HANA and cloud components within key processes of the Intelligent Enterprise.

This service is available for solutions that are either in production or close to production start-up. It is most applicable if you have interfaces with known or suspected problems in meeting requirements such as:

  • Stability and a high throughput with an optimal interface configuration
  • Rapid response time for a good performance

Please check the service infosheet in SAP Support Portal to learn about the scope, key features and benefits of this service, when to use it or not and further details of the delivery.

CQC for deployment readiness for SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management

This service is designed to provide a key settings review before the go-live. During this remote service, an analysis of the SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management tenant is performed and recommendations for optimal configuration are given in alignment with SAP best practices.

Service can be used:

  • Before the go-live of a new SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management implementation.
  • Implementation of additional SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management functionality or additional go-live phases
  • As a “health check” for productive SAP SuccessFactors Incentive Management systems.

Service cannot be used:

  • If you have issues with specific business processes
  • if you require a design review or if you require consulting expertise.

Please check the service infosheet in SAP Support Portal to learn about the scope, key features and benefits of this service, when to use it or not and further details of the delivery.

Requesting these remote services

Remote Services can be requested via the Get Support application in SAP for Me (SAP Note 1296527). When submitting your request, please select:

  • Product: “Continuous Quality Check & Improvement Services”
  • Product function: “Service request for a Cloud Solution”

If you need assistance in submitting your case, you may contact your local Customer Interaction Center (CIC).

Please note the priority of these cases cannot be high or very high. This product and product function do not accept these priorities.

Further Support and Empowerment via SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps

Value Maps are a support and empowerment program from SAP Enterprise Support and are available to you via the SAP Learning Hub. A one-time sign in with your S User is required, and everything thereafter is free as part of your entitlements. We provide:

  • Prescriptive Guidance
  • Empowerment
  • Social Collaboration
  • Expert Access

Check out the SAP Enterprise Support value maps landing page  for more and start engaging today!

entry.title: Message "'UI Update' has encountered a problem." appears often while debugging in ADT
entry.content:
Hi ADT developers and Community,

Lately, I got very often the message "'UI Update' has encountered a problem." every time when I want to open a table in debugger. Like on a image below:

I'm using:

Eclipse IDE for Java Developers (includes Incubating components)
Version: 2024-06 (4.32.0)
Build id: 20240606-1231

with Darkest Dark Theme with DevStyle 2024.2.0.

Is this a bug or maybe there are something to do in Preferences? Appreciate any hint. 😉

Thanks.

Regards,
Nemanja

entry.title: please share the archive link to download database Oracle SBP 19.18.0.0.230117
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

We are under AWS migration activity from on-premise to AWS cloud for SAP GTS 11.0

 

Current SAP version: SAP NetWeaver 7.5 and GTS 11.0

Database version: 19.11.0.0.210420 (32545013)

OS version: HPUX

 

Target SAP Version: No changes in SAP versions

Database version: 19.18.0.0.230117

OS: OEL 8.9

 

Please check and let us know if any compatible for source and Target DB version patch level changes with SAP NW7.5/GTS 11.0

We already checked in PAM but it shows only oracle base version 19.0.0.0 whereas not found for patch level?

 

Also please share the archive link to download database Oracle SBP 19.18.0.0.230117

entry.title: Why is Foreign Key not generated for Association in CDS (CAP) when running "cds compile" command ?
entry.content:
I have the following CDS entities

entity Book {
    key id     : Integer;
        author : String;
        title  : String;
}

entity Summary {
    book    : Association to Book;
    summary : String;
    lang    : String;
}

I'd like to have the summary of a book in different languages.

When I run the following command

cds compile model.cds -2 sql

I get the following DDL as output

CREATE TABLE my_app_Book (
  id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  author NVARCHAR(255),
  title NVARCHAR(255),
  PRIMARY KEY(id)
);

CREATE TABLE my_app_Summary (
  book_id INTEGER,
  summary NVARCHAR(255),
  lang NVARCHAR(255)
);

 However I was also expecting a FOREIGN KEY on book_id to relate the two tables.

Is this a bug or expected behaviour ?

If this is actually the expectation, then is there any way I can configure my CDS such that the DB table schema can clearly link the two tables ?

entry.title: Re: Why is Foreign Key not generated for Association in C...
entry.content:
The foreign key is generated in your example. The foreign key of "Book" in "Summary" is "book_id". What is the problem here?

If you want to make it more explicit and also generate a foreign key constraint to enforce referential integrity, please consult our documentation to learn more about foreign key constraints.

entry.title: How to identify relevant scope items for an app in CBC?
entry.content:
Hello.

I would like to activate the "Trigger Recurring Inspections of Batches" app (QA07) in our public cloud system and in order to do so, scope item activation is required as it was not included in the initial scope item setup.

However, unlike other app in the fiori app library, the required scope item for this app is not mentioned on the bottom of the product features tab, where I usually find relevant scope item for apps.

 

Could anyone tell me what are the related scope items for this app or where I can find the scopes needed?

Fiori app library link: https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('QA07')/S32

Thank you in advance.

Fujita

entry.title: Re: Debug Mode(/H) history
entry.content:
Excactly

One of my old answers... trace of variable changed in debug available in system log, but not always related to database change (how could the program identif those...)

entry.title: S/4 Hana public Cloud - API for journal entry line item failing
entry.content:
We have created a custom field for coding block.

We are trying to update this field using API "CHANGE JOURNAL ENTRY ITEM". It's working in most cases but failing for these cases:

- Cost element category 22

- Cost element category 43

- Depreciation G/L account

Do you know why the API update is not working ?

entry.title: SAP CAP external ODATA which does not support skip
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an external ODATA service (MS Graph user API) which I want to use for a user search in a CAP application (based on a value help dialog).

So this works in general and I'm able to retrieve the initial set of data. But if the search returns more data the table tries to load the additional records with a $skip call the the MS Graph API. The api does not support these call and returns an exception.

Error during request to remote service: '$skip' is not supported by the service.

So I added the annotation:

@Capabilities.SkipSupported: false
entity users as projection on app.users;

But this setting has no influence on the value help. So the call is send with the $skip parameter...

Anybody an idea ?

entry.title: Re: Semi-automatic custom code adaptation for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi Olga,

Thanks for sharing!

Very useful, help us a lot.

Regards,

ZFiori.

🙂

entry.content:

is it possible to integrate a non UI5 app in the launchpad with the plugin? We would like to link a React app.

Chiara

entry.title: Re: Pricing problem in Commerce Cloud with CPS
entry.content:
Then I suggest to enable debug logging for following classes, in order to see where and why the price request gets lost.

de.hybris.platform.sap.productconfig.facades.impl.ConfigurationPricingFacadeImpl
de.hybris.platform.sap.productconfig.services.impl.PricingServiceImpl
de.hybris.platform.sap.productconfig.runtime.cps.pricing.impl.PricingHandlerImpl
de.hybris.platform.sap.productconfig.runtime.cps.impl.CharonPricingFacadeImpl

entry.title: Re: With SAP Quartz Dark Theme when I open a Message in B...
entry.content:
Hello Jozsef. 

Can you advise if the issue also occurs with patch 7 of SAP GUI for Windows?

entry.title: Re: Negative Stock for Batch managed items
entry.content:
You receive a batch with vendor invoice qty=100

You want to sell to your customer qty=101

Allowing negative qty for this scenario is not correct. What you must do is adjust your stock before selling the item. You can create a goods receipt qty=1 and according to your business requirements, whith price=0 so that your real qty is reflected in the warehouse without affecting stock balance account or price = vendor price if you want to affect stock value with the adjustment and respectively cogs during sales. 
P.S.: It;s an old question most probably already solved but this answer may be useful to someone arriving here from search.

entry.title: Re: Thoughts on SAP CodeConnect 2024
entry.content: Thanks for the shout out @BenPatterson and your summary! It was really a great event and for you a fantastic opportunity to come to Germany and get all the knowledge and updates, and connect with your community peers. I am glad, we finally met in person. 😊

entry.title: Re: SAP Quartz Theme Font Issues on SAP GUI 8 PL 5
entry.content: This typically is indicative of a memory or rendering issue. A restart usually fixes this. We have had a few reports of this, but never been able to replicate this i ssue on demand.

entry.title: _EVT_OBJECT element in event container not filled after CREATED event of BOR Object BUS1505
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

We are developing a (flexible) workflow to approve real estate contracts with BOR object BUS1505. We have created a workflow template and defined one workflow start event: "CREATED" for BOR object BUS1505 and its corresponding binding. 

After creating a contract via RECN, we can see that a "CREATED" event is raised in the SWEL for our Workflow(See pictures). Sadly the expression _EVT_OBJECT of the event container does not get populated with data. How is this possible? Am I missing some configuration?

When testing the workflow through "Test" (F8) in SWDD_SCENARIO and filling in a key, the _EVT_OBJECT element gets populated with data nicely as you can see in the pictures. It seems that when the "CREATED" event is raised normally, it inserts "IS" before the object key. 

Since we can not fill the event container with the right data, this also means that we can not fill the workflow container with the right data. Can someone help? Help is much appreciated.
